title: Music Class 音乐课
scene: 音乐课上，老师教同学们唱一首英文歌。

lines.en: Class, today we are going to learn a new English song.
lines.zh: 同学们，今天我们要学一首新的英文歌。

lines.en: What's the song called, Ms. Zhang?
lines.zh: 张老师，这首歌叫什么名字？

lines.en: It's called "Twinkle, Twinkle, Little Star." Do you know it?
lines.zh: 叫"一闪一闪小星星"。你们知道吗？

lines.en: I think I've heard it before, but I don't remember the words.
lines.zh: 我好像听过，但记不住歌词。

lines.en: Don't worry. I'll teach you line by line.
lines.zh: 别担心。我会一句一句教你们。

lines.en: OK! I love singing. Can we sing together?
lines.zh: 好的！我喜欢唱歌。我们可以一起唱吗？

lines.en: Of course! Let's start with the first line. Follow me.
lines.zh: 当然！我们先从第一行开始。跟我唱。

lines.en: "Twinkle, twinkle, little star, how I wonder what you are."
lines.zh: "一闪一闪小星星，我想知道你是什么。"

lines.en: That's easy! I think I can sing the whole song!
lines.zh: 这很容易！我觉得我能唱整首歌！

lines.en: Great! Let's all sing it together now!
lines.zh: 太好了！现在大家一起唱！
